summary: 3 film announcements, 4 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: Shifters
film.announcement: Channel 4 and See-Saw Films are developing a TV adaptation of Benedict Lombe's play 'Shifters,' which is transferring to A24's Cherry Lane Theatre.

film.title: Heirloom
film.announcement: Indian animator Upamanyu Bhattacharyya's 'Heirloom' closes French co-production with Condor Films and lands CNC grant support.

film.title: Sheep in the Box
film.announcement: Neon drops first trailer for Hirokazu Koreeda's AI family drama 'Sheep in the Box.'

tv.title: The Ghost in the Shell
tv.announcement: Science Saru Studio's 'The Ghost in the Shell' is bound for Prime Video, adapting the franchise through hand-drawn animation.

tv.title: Gunshot
tv.talent: Kent Tsai, Chan Tzu-Hsuan, Mark Lee
tv.announcement: Police drama 'Gunshot' starts production for Taiwan's PTS Taigi with Kent Tsai, Chan Tzu-Hsuan, and Mark Lee heading the cast.

tv.title: MechWest
tv.announcement: Dieselpunk animated series 'MechWest' lands global distribution deal with Toonz.

tv.title: Prudence
tv.announcement: OuiDo! adult animation company launches with horror series 'Prudence' from producers of 'Mars Express.'
